description: This video explains the fundamental differences between cryptocurrencies and fiat money, focusing on decentralization and the role of blockchain technology.
topic_summary: Cryptocurrencies differ from fiat money due to their decentralized nature and reliance on blockchain technology for transaction verification and record maintenance [t=0:32]. Unlike digital currencies in centralized systems like PayPal, cryptocurrencies are designed to be owned collectively without a single controlling entity [t=15:68].
